Table DCS_PROMOTION

Card of table DCS_PROMOTION

Name

DCS_PROMOTION

Code

DCS_PROMOTION

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_PROMOTION

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_CONSUMERORDER" schema

called "DCS_PROMOTION".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_PROMOTION_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(ORDER_ID, PROMOTION_ID, MARKET_CODE,VALID_FROM))

 

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. The result in the target object must stay deduplicated.

 

7. Verify whether the newcoming ingested records in the source already exist in the Presentation Layer with any previous load, based on the

Unique Record Identifier.

i. If Yes, don't propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

ii. If No, propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

 

 

8. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

9. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

10. Use "__WRITE_TS" to set up record validity to maintain history (VALID_FROM, VALID_TO)

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD2

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_PROMOTION

CKT_DCS_PROMOTION


Server validation rule of the table DCS_PROMOTION

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_PROMOTION

drop table DCS_PROMOTION cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_PROMOTION
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION (
DCS_PROMOTION_KEY TEXT not null,
PROMOTION_ID INTEGER not null,
NAME TEXT,
ORDER_ID INTEGER not null,
DCS_ORDER_KEY TEXT not null,
FROM_DATE DATE,
TO_DATE DATE,
PRIORITY INTEGER,
STOP TEXT,
ZONE TEXT,
STATUS TEXT,
NUMBER_OF_USAGES INTEGER,
REGISTRATION_DATE DATE,
CAMPAIGN TEXT,
COUPON_CODE TEXT not null,
DISCOUNT_VALUE INTEGER not null,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_PROMOTION primary key (DCS_PROMOTION_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.DCS_PROMOTION_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.PROMOTION_ID is
'Promotion identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.NAME is
'Promotion name';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.ORDER_ID is
'Order Identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.DCS_ORDER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.FROM_DATE is
'Promotion valid from';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.TO_DATE is
'Promotion valid to ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.PRIORITY is
'Promotion priority';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.STATUS is
'Order status code identifier (values vary per market):';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.NUMBER_OF_USAGES is
'Counter promotion applied';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.REGISTRATION_DATE is
'Date of the registration ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.CAMPAIGN is
'Related campaign name';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.COUPON_CODE is
'Order data details - Coupon code applied - if order data type is "C" -';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.DISCOUNT_VALUE is
'Amount of discount';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION
add constraint FK_DCS_PROM_R15_PROMO_DCS_ORDE foreign key (ORDER_ID)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER (DCS_ORDER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION
add constraint FK_DCS_PROM_R18_PROMO_DCS_ORDE foreign key (DCS_ORDER_KEY)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER (DCS_ORDER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
